articles.author: Wilson Mcmakin
articles.title: Malian defense chief is killed as jihadis and rebels seize towns and military bases - AP News
articles.description: Malian Minister of Defense Gen. Sadio Camara has been killed in an attack as jihadi and rebel forces seized towns and military bases across the West African country. His death was confirmed by a spokesman and broadcast on state-run television on Sunday. Separ…
articles.content: DAKAR, Senegal (AP) Mali s defense minister was killed in a sweeping attack by jihadis and rebels who seized several towns and military bases, authorities said Sunday, the latest violence in the junt… [+5197 chars]
